titleStmt.title: SII 37.131: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 131. (A.R. No. B 2 of 1940.) Aṭlūru, Siddhavatam Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: On a slab lying in a field about a furlong to the east of the Gangamma temple.
This is dated Śaka 1464, Parābhava (wrong), Āshāḍha ba. 14, corresponding to 1542 A.D., July 11, Tuesday. However, the cyclic year is Śubhakṛit.

It records the grant of several taxes such as kaṭṭapannu, kāṇike, Vēṭikūḍam and Dommaripannu to the barber Koṇḍōju of Aṭlūru by Māḍrāju Ramarāju at the instance of Rāmārāju and with the permission of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1464 Agu
nēṁṭi parābhava saṁvvatsara Āṣāḍha ba
15 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirājapara
mēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadāsivarā
yadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru vijayanagara
maṁddu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuḍai pṛthivisā
ṁbrāṁjyamu śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu rāya
la Ānatiṁ kūḍānu rāmarāju mudulanu
māḍrāju rāmarājayyadēva mahārājulayya
vāru vēyiṁcina silāśāsanamu . Aṭlūru ma
ṁgaḷa koṁḍōjugāriki kaṭṭapannu kānike ve
ṭikūḍaṁ doṁmari pannu saha sarvamā
nyaṁgānuṁnnu pāliṁcci viḍicinadi yidu
dha¨rmānaku yavvaru tappinānu kukkamāṁsa
munu surānu sēviṁccunavāru . maṁggaḷa
koḍukulu .
Digital edition of SII 37.131 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
